items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Click-to-order attribution decision with window logic' requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality but does not provide any evidence that it has been implemented or validated in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive result.
